name: Caramel Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine oil and sugar. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
2. Combine dry ingredients; add to batter and stir well.
3. Fold in apples, walnuts, and vanilla. Pour into a greased and floured 10-inch tube pan.
4. Bake at 325°F for 1 - 1/2 hours or until done.
5. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes; remove to a wire rack to cool completely.
6. In a double boiler over simmering water, heat brown sugar, cream, butter, and salt until sugar is dissolved.
7. Cool to room temperature. Beat in confectioner's sugar until smooth; drizzle over cake.
8. Sprinkle with nuts if desired.
